2604.09130.title: EquiformerV3: Scaling Efficient, Expressive, and General SE(3)-Equivariant Graph Attention Transformers
2604.09130.paper_summary: As $SE(3)$-equivariant graph neural networks mature as a core tool for 3D atomistic modeling, improving their efficiency, expressivity, and physical consistency has become a central challenge for large-scale applications. In this work, we introduce EquiformerV3, the third generation of the $SE(3)$-equivariant graph attention Transformer, designed to advance all three dimensions: efficiency, expressivity, and generality. Building on EquiformerV2, we have the following three key advances. First, we optimize the software implementation, achieving $1.75\times$ speedup. Second, we introduce simple and effective modifications to EquiformerV2, including equivariant merged layer normalization, improved feedforward network hyper-parameters, and attention with smooth radius cutoff. Third, we propose SwiGLU-$S^2$ activations to incorporate many-body interactions for better theoretical expressivity and to preserve strict equivariance while reducing the complexity of sampling $S^2$ grids. Together, SwiGLU-$S^2$ activations and smooth-cutoff attention enable accurate modeling of smoothly varying potential energy surfaces (PES), generalizing EquiformerV3 to tasks requiring energy-conserving simulations and higher-order derivatives of PES. With these improvements, EquiformerV3 trained with the auxiliary task of denoising non-equilibrium structures (DeNS) achieves state-of-the-art results on OC20, OMat24, and Matbench Discovery.
2604.09130.paper_summary_zh: 隨著 $SE(3)$-不變圖神經網絡作為 3D 原子建模的核心工具逐漸成熟，提高其效率、表達能力和物理一致性已成為大規模應用的核心挑戰。在這項工作中，我們介紹了 EquiformerV3，這是第三代 $SE(3)$-不變圖注意力 Transformer，旨在推進這三個維度：效率、表達能力和通用性。在 EquiformerV2 的基礎上，我們有以下三個關鍵進展。首先，我們優化了軟體實現，實現了 $1.75\times$ 的加速。其次，我們對 EquiformerV2 進行了簡單而有效的修改，包括不變合併層正規化、改進的前饋網絡超參數以及具有平滑半徑截止的注意力。第三，我們提出了 SwiGLU-$S^2$ 激活，以納入多體相互作用以獲得更好的理論表達能力，並在降低採樣 $S^2$ 網格的複雜性的同時保持嚴格的不變性。綜合來看，SwiGLU-$S^2$ 激活和平滑截止注意力使得準確建模平滑變化的潛能能量面（PES）成為可能，將 EquiformerV3 推廣到需要能量守恆模擬和 PES 高階導數的任務。通過這些改進，使用去噪非平衡結構（DeNS）輔助任務訓練的 EquiformerV3 在 OC20、OMat24 和 Matbench Discovery 上達到了最先進的結果。
2604.09130.author: Yi-Lun Liao et.al.
2604.09130.authors: Yi-Lun Liao, Alexander J. Hoffman, Sabrina C. Shen, Alexandre Duval, Sam Walton Norwood, Tess Smidt
